# AuraSpend — Image Asset Prompts

Use these prompts with Midjourney v6, DALL-E 3, or any AI image generator to create all visual assets for AuraSpend.

---

## 1. App Icon

```
A minimalist Android app icon on a pure transparent background. Exact square crop, 1024x1024 resolution.

SHAPE: A perfect circle filling most of the square with no padding inside the circle itself — the outer boundary is the circle edge. Do NOT draw a square background; the asset should be a circular icon on transparent canvas.

CIRCLE BACKGROUND: Solid rich purple — exact hex #5E3A8B (a slightly deeper royal purple than Material primary, chosen for screen readability). Completely flat, no gradients, no shadows, no strokes, no borders on the circle edge. The circle diameter fills approximately 85% of the 1024x1024 frame, centered.

FOREGROUND ELEMENT — LETTER "A":
- A single uppercase letter "A" rendered as a solid white (#FFFFFF) geometric sans-serif letterform.
- The "A" is positioned dead center of the circle.
- The "A" should use a clean geometric sans-serif style — think Futura Bold or Avant Garde Gothic — with sharp triangular apex, straight angled legs, and a horizontal crossbar.
- The "A" should occupy roughly 55-60% of the circle's interior diameter.
- The legs of the "A" have moderate stroke weight (not too thin, not too thick — roughly 10-11% of the "A" height).
- The crossbar of the "A" sits exactly at the vertical midpoint of the letter.
- The apex of the "A" does NOT touch the top edge of the circle — there is breathing room above it.
- The feet of the "A" do NOT touch the bottom edge — equal breathing room below.

FOREGROUND ELEMENT — ACCENT CIRCLE (COIN/PLANET):
- One small solid circle in light purple — exact hex #C4A6E6 (a soft pastel lavender).
- Positioned to the UPPER RIGHT of the "A", not overlapping the letter's main structure.
- The accent circle should sit approximately at the same height as the "A"'s crossbar, slightly above it, and to the right.
- The accent circle diameter should be roughly 15-18% of the "A" height — noticeably smaller than the letter, clearly a secondary decorative element.
- Inside the accent circle: ONE tiny solid dot in the same deep purple as the background (#5E3A8B), perfectly centered inside the lavender circle. The dot diameter is approximately 35-40% of the lavender circle's diameter.

SPATIAL RELATIONSHIPS (critical for balance):
- Imagine a clock face. The "A" apex is at 12 o'clock. The accent circle sits approximately at the 1:30 to 2:00 position relative to the "A" apex.
- The accent circle is completely separated from the "A" — there is a visible gap between them. They do not touch, overlap, or intersect.
- When looking at the full icon, the "A" is the dominant visual element. The accent circle reads as a subtle secondary detail — like a small planet or coin floating near the letter.

STYLE RULES:
- Zero gradients anywhere. Zero shadows anywhere. Zero glows anywhere. Zero strokes or outlines.
- Only THREE colors used: deep purple #5E3A8B (background circle), white #FFFFFF (letter A), light lavender #C4A6E6 (accent circle with purple dot inside).
- Completely flat design — no depth, no 3D, no shading, no bevels, no metallic effects.
- No glossy reflections, no glass texture, no material sheen.
- No text, no letters other than the "A", no symbols, no numbers, no icons other than the accent circle.
- No grain, noise, or texture overlay.
- Perfect vector quality with mathematically clean curves and straight lines.
- The overall impression should be: clean, premium, modern, minimalist, slightly playful (due to the small accent circle), suitable for a fintech/personal finance app.

OUTPUT SPECIFICATION:
- Format: Square 1:1 aspect ratio, 1024x1024 pixels, PNG with transparent background around the circular icon.
- No padding/margin inside the image — the circle should be the only visible element on transparent canvas.
```

---

## 2. Hero Device Mockup (Website)

```
A premium Android smartphone floating in center frame, held at a slight 15-degree angle, displaying a beautiful dark-themed expense tracking app. The screen shows a dashboard with: a total balance card at top, income/expense summary, a purple donut chart, and a recent transactions list. AMOLED true-black background with purple (#6750A4) accent UI elements. Soft ambient purple gradient lighting around the phone. Minimalist clean background. High-end product photography style with shallow depth of field. 3D render quality.
```

---

## 3. OG Social Preview (1200x630px)

```
A wide social media banner card with a dark purple gradient background (#1C0E34 to #6750A4). Large bold white text "AuraSpend" centered. Subtitle "Beautiful Expense Management for Android" in light purple (#D0BCFF) below. A subtle glowing aurora/sparkle visual effect behind the text. Bottom line in small text: "Open Source · Apache 2.0". Clean, minimal, premium brand feel. No device mockups or screenshots. Material Design 3 inspired layout.
```

---

## 4. Feature Card Illustrations (9 icons, ~120x120px each)

Style for all: 2px stroke line-art icons on a soft purple (#F3E8FF) circular background, Material Design 3 style, minimalist, vector, consistent visual weight.

| # | Feature | Prompt |
|---|---------|--------|
| 1 | Auto-Classification | A simple line-art chat bubble with a dollar sign inside and an incoming arrow pointing toward it. Thin 2px strokes, rounded corners, purple (#6750A4) lines on #F3E8FF circle background. |
| 2 | Budget Tracking | A circular progress gauge/ring with a checkmark at the completion point and a target bullseye in the center. Minimal line-art. Purple strokes. |
| 3 | Recurring Subscriptions | A calendar page icon with a circular refresh/arrow loop around it. Clean 2px strokes. Purple on light purple circle. |
| 4 | Google Drive Backup | A cloud shape with a shield overlay and a checkmark inside the shield. Minimal line-art. Purple strokes on lavender circle. |
| 5 | CSV Import/Export | A document/file icon with an upward arrow on one side and a downward arrow on the other. Simple line-art style. Purple on #F3E8FF. |
| 6 | Insights & Analytics | A bar chart with bars ascending upward and a line graph overlaid. Clean minimalist chart icon. Purple strokes. |
| 7 | AMOLED Theme | A crescent moon with two small stars beside it. Simple celestial icon. Purple strokes on light purple circle. |
| 8 | Material 3 Design | A color palette swatch (overlapping squares) with a small sparkle/star accent. Material Design style. Purple strokes. |
| 9 | Open Source | Two angle bracket characters `< / >` with a small lock or shield. Code-style icon. Purple strokes on #F3E8FF circle. |

---

## 5. Play Store Feature Graphic (1024x500px)

```
A wide horizontal banner for Google Play Store. Left side: bold white "AuraSpend" with tagline "Smart Expense Tracking" in smaller light purple text below. Right side: an Android phone mockup showing the app's dark AMOLED transaction list screen with purple accent headers. Background is a rich gradient from deep dark purple (#1C0E34 on left) to vibrant purple (#6750A4 on right). A few subtle floating geometric shapes (circles, triangles) in lighter purple tones. Clean, no clutter. Professional app store quality.
```

---

## 6. Play Store Screenshots (6 images, 1080x1920px each)

All screenshots should share: Android device frame, dark mode AMOLED theme, purple (#6750A4) accent color, Material 3 design, clean typography, status bar visible.

### Screenshot 1 — Dashboard
```
A dark-themed app dashboard screen showing: a large "Total Balance" card at the top with a balance amount, two smaller cards for "Income" and "Expenses" side by side, a colorful donut/ring chart below showing spending by category (each slice in a different color: purple, teal, amber, rose, cyan), and a list of recent transactions underneath. Purple accent color for selected elements. True black background.
```

### Screenshot 2 — Transactions
```
A full-screen transaction list view. At the top: a search bar with a filter icon. Below: horizontal row of filter chips (All, Food, Transport, Bills, Shopping). Below: a list of transaction items, each showing merchant/name on left, amount on right, date and category chip below the name. Items separated by subtle dividers. A FAB (floating action button) in purple at bottom-right. Dark AMOLED theme.
```

### Screenshot 3 — Budgets
```
A budget management screen showing multiple budget categories as horizontal progress bars. Each row has: category name on left, "spent/limit" amount on right, and a thin progress bar below showing percentage filled in purple. One budget is highlighted: "Groceries — $320 / $400" with the bar at 80% in purple. A green "On Track" label next to it. Add budget button at bottom. Clean, easy to scan.
```

### Screenshot 4 — Analytics
```
A full-screen analytics view with a large smooth area chart at the top showing "Spending Over Time" with the line in purple and a subtle gradient fill below. Below the chart: a horizontal bar chart comparing "Spending by Category" with bars in different soft colors. Toggle buttons for "Week / Month / Year" in a segmented control. Total spent amount displayed prominently. Dark background.
```

### Screenshot 5 — Smart Add
```
A view showing the "Add Transaction" interface. A bottom sheet covers the lower half of the screen with two large option cards: left card shows an SMS icon with "Forward SMS" text, right card shows a pencil/edit icon with "Manual Entry" text. Purple accent header on the bottom sheet. A faint blurred background showing the main dashboard behind the sheet. Dark AMOLED theme.
```

### Screenshot 6 — Subscriptions
```
A subscriptions management list. A summary card at the top showing "Total Monthly: $84.50" in large text with a subtle purple background. Below: a list of subscription items — each showing service name, amount, next billing date, and a status tag (green "Active" or amber "Expiring Soon"). Icons representing each service (streaming, music, cloud storage). Clean list layout.
```

## 7. GitHub Social Preview (1280x640px)

```
A GitHub-style social preview banner. Dark background (#1C0E34 to #381E72 gradient). Left side: "auraspend" in a monospace/code font. Subtitle "Expense Manager · Material 3 · Android" in lighter text. Right side: a small centered purple circle icon (the app icon) with a subtle glow. Bottom-right corner: a small white GitHub logo/mark. Clean, developer-friendly aesthetic.
```
